## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSession.selectFillingRecipe() method

Selects a filling recipe for a specific slot.

**Signature:**

```typescript
selectFillingRecipe(slotId: SlotId, recipeId: RecipeId): Result<true>;
```
